<div class="about-content reveal visible"><span class="section-label">Project Overview</span><h1 class="section-title">Palace Oastra<br><em>The Oasis — Emaar Dubailand</em></h1><div class="divider"></div>
<p><a href="emaar-oasis-palace-ostra-dubai/" style="color:var(--gold);font-weight:600">Palace Oastra</a> is a newly launched luxury hotel residential development by Emaar Properties, located in the prestigious Downtown Dubai / Zabeel area near DIFC and Emirates Towers. The project offers spacious 1 to 4-bedroom branded hotel residences with stunning views of Burj Khalifa and the Museum of the Future. Arada is known for iconic UAE projects including Masaar, Aljada, W Residences, Jouri Hills, and Armani Beach Residences. Explore other <a href="/emaar-projects-dubai/" style="color:var(--gold)">Dubai real estate projects</a>.</p>
<p>1-bedroom residences start from AED 3.59 Million. 2 and larger residences are available at competitive pricing. Buyers benefit from a flexible 50/50 payment plan with 10% down payment and completion targeted for 2028. Also compare with <a href="/arada-akala-hotel-residences-tower-difc-dubai/" style="color:var(--gold)">Arada Akala at DIFC</a> for the sister branded tower development.</p>
<p>Located near Downtown Dubai, DIFC, Emirates Towers Metro, and the Museum of the Future, Palace Oastra offers premium connectivity to Dubai's key business and lifestyle hubs. All qualifying investments are eligible for the <strong>UAE 10-Year Golden Visa</strong>. Contact us at <a href="tel:+971551554892" style="color:var(--gold)">+971 55 155 4892</a>.</p>

<script>
/* Emaar Valley — Mobile Menu v32 */
(function(){
    'use strict';

    var OPEN = false;
    var btn, menu, overlay, closeBtn;

    var MENU_STYLE = [
        'position:fixed',
        'top:0',
        'left:0',
        'width:100%',
        'height:100%',
        'background:#ffffff',
        'z-index:999999',
        'display:flex',
        'flex-direction:column',
        'overflow-y:auto',
        'padding:70px 0 2rem',
        'box-shadow:2px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)',
        'transition:transform 0.3s ease',
    ].join(';');

    function isMobile() {
        return window.innerWidth <= 768;
    }

    function openMenu() {
        if (!menu || !btn) return;
        OPEN = true;

        /* Show menu */
        menu.setAttribute('style', MENU_STYLE);

        /* Show overlay */
        if (overlay) {
            overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:999998;';
        }

        /* Hamburger → X */
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
        var spans = btn.querySelectorAll('span');
        if (spans[0]) spans[0].style.cssText = 'transform:rotate(45deg) translate(5px,5px);background:#8B6914';
        if (spans[1]) spans[1].style.cssText = 'opacity:0';
        if (spans[2]) spans[2].style.cssText = 'transform:rotate(-45deg) translate(5px,-5px);background:#8B6914';

        /* Show close button */
        if (closeBtn) closeBtn.style.display = 'block';

        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    }

    function closeMenu() {
        if (!menu || !btn) return;
        OPEN = false;

        /* Hide menu */
        menu.removeAttribute('style');
        if (isMobile()) {
            menu.style.display = 'none';
        }

        /* Hide overlay */
        if (overlay) overlay.style.cssText = 'display:none';

        /* X → Hamburger */
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        var spans = btn.querySelectorAll('span');
        if (spans[0]) spans[0].style.cssText = '';
        if (spans[1]) spans[1].style.cssText = '';
        if (spans[2]) spans[2].style.cssText = '';

        /* Hide close button */
        if (closeBtn) closeBtn.style.display = 'none';

        document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }

    function init() {
        btn  = document.getElementById('navToggle');
        menu = document.getElementById('navLinks');

        if (!btn || !menu) return;

        /* Create overlay */
        overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.id = 'navOverlay';
        overlay.style.cssText = 'display:none';
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);

        /* Create close (X) button inside menu */
        closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
        closeBtn.innerHTML = '✕';
        closeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Close menu');
        closeBtn.style.cssText = [
            'display:none',
            'position:fixed',
            'top:16px',
            'right:16px',
            'z-index:9999999',
            'background:none',
            'border:2px solid #8B6914',
            'color:#8B6914',
            'width:36px',
            'height:36px',
            'border-radius:50%',
            'font-size:1rem',
            'cursor:pointer',
            'line-height:1',
        ].join(';');
        closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu);
        document.body.appendChild(closeBtn);

        /* Hide menu on mobile initially */
        if (isMobile()) {
            menu.style.display = 'none';
        }

        /* Toggle on button click */
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            if (OPEN) {
                closeMenu();
            } else {
                openMenu();
            }
        });

        /* Close on overlay click */
        overlay.addEventListener('click', closeMenu);

        /* Close on resize to desktop */
        window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
            if (!isMobile()) {
                closeMenu();
                menu.removeAttribute('style');
            } else if (!OPEN) {
                menu.style.display = 'none';
            }
        });

        /* Close on Escape key */
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Escape' && OPEN) closeMenu();
        });
    }

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
    } else {
        init();
    }
})();
</script>
